task: Frontend Batch 6 - Public API Error States and Error Boundary Reinforcement
scope: frontend public API error-state, notFound, empty-state, loading, and error-boundary tests
behaviorBugsFound: Public error boundaries rendered raw error.message and could leak backend/status/stack-like details.
Resume API failure threw through the public route instead of rendering the existing no-resume fallback.
The first resume catch also handled Next dynamic-render bailout errors until unstable_rethrow was added.
risks: Browser-level initial public API 500 coverage still needs a deterministic server-fetch mocking harness.
Work detail relies on the shared public segment boundary because it has no route-specific error/loading files.
Public metadata API failure/notFound fallback coverage remains a P2 gap.
recommendation: Proceed to form/media validation for image, video, and PDF edge cases.
